frostfest.name: Frostfest
frostfest.description: Something is brewing in the frozen depths of the blockchain... A smart contract-based game is about to begin. Prepare yourself. Only a few days left before it begins...

bloombrawl.name: Bloombrawl
bloombrawl.description: Spring has arrived and new life stirs beneath the soil of the blockchain... Bloom Brawl has begun — a season of new awakenings, fierce competition, and untamed growth. The roots remember!
